title: Vanilla Igloo Desktop [TARDIS Refined]
description: A vanilla generated Igloo desktop for Tardis Refined
body:
A Custom TARDIS Desktop made from a Vanilla Generated Igloo for the Mod TARDIS Refined

Equipped with regular Igloo blocks, however the Zombie and Villager are not present

Console in the basement main room (it is a little cramped)

added entrance to the airlock
